qraTrust.label: System-Test Ready
qraTrust.use_policy: Use current QRAs as plausible corpus artifacts for testing Sparta Explorer, Sparta Chat, /create-evidence-case, retrieval, and conversation-lab workflows; do not present them as Aerospace Corp expert-blessed answers.
qraTrust.next_action: After SPARTA Corpora and Explorer surfaces are complete, route current QRAs through Aerospace Corp cybersecurity expert evaluation and blessing metadata.

remediation_plans.title: Prompt Health remediation plan
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
remediation_plans.rationale: Prompt Health is a lane subagent: it may scan prompt units, classify best-practices-prompt failures, and prepare review-prompt payloads automatically; prompt text edits remain review-gated unless the patch is mechanical and all prompt gates pass.
suggested_checks: run best-practices-prompt against failed prompt units
run review-prompt for any non-mechanical prompt rewrite
run a prompt parity/canary before production QRA generation
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Let the Prompt Health lane generate review-prompt payloads; approve only narrow prompt edits with passing prompt-health and canary checks.

remediation_plans.title: UX Coverage remediation plan
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
remediation_plans.rationale: Missing data-qid coverage should become narrow React/test-interactions tasks with CDP verification.
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Approve a narrow follow-up task before any mutation.

remediation_plans.title: Python fallback remediation plan
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
remediation_plans.rationale: Silent fallback findings need grouped risk review before narrow Python edits.
suggested_checks: add or update focused pytest coverage for each approved fallback removal
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Approve a narrow follow-up task before any mutation.

remediation_plans.title: Source/Embedding coverage backfill plan
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
remediation_plans.rationale: ArangoDB document/BM25/graph gaps and Qdrant vector gaps are observed separately; mutations stay review-required.
suggested_checks: review generated source_embedding_backfill_manifest_*.json before any mutation
rerun coverage-health after reviewed Arango/Qdrant backfill
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Approve a generated backfill manifest before executing Arango or Qdrant mutations.

remediation_plans.title: Source text and QRA coverage backfill plan
remediation_plans.rollback_hint: Create or identify a narrow git checkpoint before any mutation-capable command is executed.
remediation_plans.rationale: Controls and valid URLs must have non-stub source text plus valid QRAs before the corpus is complete.
suggested_checks: review generated source_text_qra_backfill_manifest_*.json before any fetch or QRA generation
rerun coverage-health after reviewed control/url text and QRA backfills
remediation_plans.resume_hint: Approve a generated source text/QRA manifest before executing fetch or QRA-generation mutations.
